heading: Redwood National Park and the Lake Tahoe Basin
label: 6905 Redwood National Park and the Lake Tahoe Basin
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6905(a)16:79(a), (b).o, , .Mar. 27, 1978Pub. L. 95–250, § 10692 Stat. 1716905(b)(1)– (3)(uncodified)., , .Dec. 23, 1980Pub. L. 96–586, § 2(i)94 Stat. 338316:79(c).o6905(b)(4)16:79(d).oIn subsection (a), the words “Notwithstanding any contrary provision of sections 1601 to 1607 of title 31” are omitted as unnecessary because of the restatement. The word “general” is added for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code. The words “an interest in” are added for consistency because of the source provisions restated in the revised section. The word “Government” is added for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the Code. The text of 16:79(a)(last sentence) is omitted as unnecessary.oIn subsection (b)(1)–(3), the source provisions are combined for clarity and because of the restatement.In subsection (b)(2), the words “portion of the total”, “full”, and “land or” are omitted as surplus. The words “for addition to Redwood National Park” are omitted as unnecessary because of the restatement.In subsection (b)(4), the word “affected” is omitted as surplus.

References in TextThe provisions of Act of (, ) which relate to the acquisition of the Lake Tahoe Basin, referred to in subsec. (b)(1)(B), are not classified to the Code.December 23, 1980Public Law 96–58694 Stat. 3383

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior shall make a payment for each fiscal year to each unit of general local government in which an interest in land owned by the United States Government in the Redwood National Park is located. A unit may use the payment for any governmental purpose. The payment shall be made as provided in and shall include an amount payable under section 6903.section 6903 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: owned by the Government in the Redwood National Park; or

children.label: B
children.text: acquired in the Lake Tahoe Basin under the Act of (, ).December 23, 1980Public Law 96–58694 Stat. 3383

The payment shall be made as provided in and shall include an amount payable under section 6904. However, an amount computed but not paid because of the first sentence of subsection (b) and the 2d sentence of subsection (c) of section 6904 shall be carried forward and applied to future years in which the payment would not otherwise equal the amount of real property taxes assessed and levied on the land during the last fiscal year before the fiscal year in which the interest was acquired until the amount is applied completely.section 6904 of this title
The unit of general local government may use the payment for any governmental purpose.
The Redwoods Community College District is a school district under .section 6904(b) of this title
